summary: Address 6 real bugs in hand-coded novel features surfaced by Greptile review on PR #679.
reason: Lint-cleanup sweep had inadvertently replaced unfinished or refactored variables with `_ = x` rather than completing the logic. Greptile correctly flagged the resulting dead code, ignored flags, and unbounded I/O. All fixes are functional repairs to the novel features themselves.
validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., golangci-lint v2 run ./... all clean. Fixes: (1) suppression diff three-way categorisation now exhaustive over (api,local,external) tuple with one category per email; (2) --metric flag on subusers rollup now actually filters output columns; (3) templates lint replaces os.Exit(2) with &cliError{code:2,...} so deferred db.Close()/file handles run; (4) dead firstPoll variable in activity tail removed (lobotomized when query strategy changed to msg_id dedup); (5) fetchURLCSV now uses bounded http.Client{Timeout: 30s} + NewRequestWithContext; (6) suppression sync paginates via offset+limit with maxPages safety cap, removing silent truncation at 500.
